title: rosa gallica f. virescens
intro: Rosa gallica f. virescens, also known as the Green-tinged or Green-stemmed Gallic Rose, is a variety of the Rosa gallica species, a type of rose that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Rosa gallica f. virescens include its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and as a diuretic, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of consuming Rosa gallica f. virescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Rosa gallica f. virescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and easily accessible medicinal plant.
